db:abstract.db:para: Demonstrates how assets can be loaded at runtime.

db:article.db:programlisting:
QT += quick quick3d
target.path = $$[QT_INSTALL_EXAMPLES]/quick3d/runtimeloader INSTALLS += target
qtHaveModule(widgets) { QT += widgets DEFINES += HAS_MODULE_QT_WIDGETS }
TARGET = runtimeloader
SOURCES += \ main.cpp
RESOURCES += qml.qrc
